title: HidePlugins
description: Disables /plugin command so people cant see your plugins
body:
Remove Plugin Command is a lightweight and focused server-side plugin that disables access to the /plugin command, improving both security and professionalism on your Minecraft server.

By preventing players from listing installed plugins, this plugin helps protect sensitive server information, reduces exploit targeting, and keeps your server environment more controlled.

Features
Blocks the /plugin command entirely
Prevents exposure of installed plugins
Helps reduce targeted attacks and exploits
Minimal performance impact
Simple, plug-and-play setup
Why use this?

Publicly exposing your plugin list can make your server vulnerable to known exploits tied to specific plugins. This tool ensures that information stays private, giving you better control over your server’s security.

Compatibility
Works with most Spigot, Paper, and Bukkit-based servers
No configuration required
